name: Integration - Parallel Process Orchestration
description: Validates that RFQAgent.run orchestrates Process1Service and Process2Service in parallel and aggregates their results.
input: Input payload with rfq_json containing contact_email and line_items with multiple bu_category values.
output: Aggregated results from both processes in final_json.
success_criteria: process1 and process2 results are present in final_json
error_scenarios: Process1 or Process2 returns escalated status
